title: Pabstiella carrisii
taxonomy: Pabstiella carrisii is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Within this family, it is classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Pleurothallidinae. The genus Pabstiella is further categorized under the tribe Pleurothallidinae, along with other closely related orchid species. This classification helps to organize and identify Pabstiella carrisii within the vast diversity of orchid species.
